ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the user story belongs to */,
  "story_number" TEXT /* Unique number for the user story within the project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the user story */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the user story */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the user story */,
  "estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated effort for the user story */,
  "as_a" TEXT /* Role of the user for whom the user story is created */,
  "i_want" TEXT /* Description of what the user wants */,
  "so_that" TEXT /* Reason why the user wants it */,
  "impl_details" TEXT /* Implementation details for the user story */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user story */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user story was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user story */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user story was last updated */,
  "story_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user story */,
  "story_type" TEXT /* Type of user story */,
  "acceptance_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for accepting the user story as complete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Project Manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the user is assigned to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user story the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., To Do, In Progress, Done) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the task */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was last updated */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated number of hours required to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual number of hours spent on the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user story the comment is related to */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last updated */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprints" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the sprint belongs to */,
  "sprint_name" TEXT /* Name of the sprint */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sprint */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sprint */,
  "sprint_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the sprint */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sprint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sprint was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sprint */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the sprint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprint_tasks" (
  "sprint_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint task */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sprint the task belongs to */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sprint task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sprint task was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sprint task */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the sprint task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprint_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprint_tasks_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprint_user_stories" (
  "sprint_story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint user story */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sprint the user story belongs to */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user story */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sprint user story */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sprint user story was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sprint user story */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the sprint user story was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprint_user_stories_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprint_user_stories_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("story_id")
)
